samples.gvd:
module calendar(
    input CLK,
    input RST,
    output reg [5:0] Hours,
    output reg [5:0] Mins,
    output reg [5:0] Secs
);
always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        Secs <= 6'b0;
    end else begin
        if (Secs == 6'd59) begin
            Secs <= 6'b0;
        end else begin
            Secs <= Secs + 1;
        end
    end
end
always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        Mins <= 6'b0;
    end else begin
        if (Mins == 6'd59 && Secs == 6'd59) begin
            Mins <= 6'b0;
        end else begin
            if (Secs == 6'd59) begin
                Mins <= Mins + 1;
            end else begin
                Mins <= Mins;
            end
        end
    end
end
always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
    if (RST) begin
        Hours <= 6'b0;
    end else begin
        if (Hours == 6'd23 && Mins == 6'd59 && Secs == 6'd59) begin
            Hours <= 6'b0;
        end else begin
            if (Mins == 6'd59 && Secs == 6'd59) begin
                Hours <= Hours + 1;
            end else begin
                Hours <= Hours;
            end
        end
    end
end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="calendar">
    <description>Implement a perpetual calendar.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="CLK">Clock input.</input>
        <input id="RST">Active high reset signal.</input>
        <output id="Hours" width_description="[5:0]">Current hours.</output>
        <output id="Mins" width_description="[5:0]">Current minutes.</output>
        <output id="Secs" width_description="[5:0]">Current seconds.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Perpetual calendar. Seconds, minutes, and hours are counted continuously.</implementation>
</module>
